description: This stylish sling bag from murcia is designed for the fashion conscious. Wear it on your shoulder and turn heads wherever you go! Height:27 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 14 cm Leatherette upper for durability One main compartment with a zippered pocket, a zippered seperator and a mobile pouch Two short handles Zippered pocket on the back Stitched detailing on the front Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
